note: Shared citation map for the EMC Open Target & Drug Atlas. Every atlas claim references a key here. 'verified:true' means the PMID/PMCID/DOI/NCT was confirmed to resolve to the stated source. Keys marked verified:false are PENDING verification and MUST NOT be stated as established fact downstream. Verified model/biology/genomics keys are reused from research/hypotheses/candidates.json and research/manuscripts/nr4a3-emc-biology-evidence.md (both already adversarially verified in-repo).

remiszewski2025.title: From pathogenesis to the patient's bedside: a comprehensive review of extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma

emcModels2023.title: Establishment, characterization and functional testing of two novel ex vivo extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma (EMC) cell models
emcModels2023.authors: Bangerter JL, Harnisch KJ, Chen Y, Hagedorn C, Planas-Paz L, Pauli C
emcModels2023.verification_level: Model IDs/exon breakpoints VERIFIED (search+PMC). Screen HIT IDENTITIES remain secondary-source: the EuropePMC abstract is GENERIC ('novel anti-cancer drug sensitivities including potential synergistic combinations were identified') and does NOT name carfilzomib/PU-H71/HDM201 — those come from search-snippet reads of the full text/figures (Human Cell is not OA). HDM201 stays UNCORROBORATED; carfilzomib/PU-H71 stay snippet-level pending full text.
emcModels2023.role: Source of USZ20-EMC1 (EWSR1 ex13::NR4A3 ex2) and USZ22-EMC2 (TAF15 ex6::NR4A3 ex2) sarcosphere models and the drug screen (17 chemo drugs + a targeted medium-throughput panel).

emcCellLine2025.title: Establishment and characterization of NCC-EMC1-C1: a novel patient-derived cell line of extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
emcCellLine2025.authors: Iwata S, et al. (Kondo T group, National Cancer Center, Japan)
emcCellLine2025.verification_level: PRIMARY ABSTRACT confirmed via EuropePMC (CI, 2026-07-11): 'High-throughput screening of 221 anticancer drugs using NCC-EMC1-C1 identified three candidates, brigatinib, panobinostat, and romidepsin, that demonstrated low IC50 values'; 'EMC is defined by specific gene fusions involving NR4A3, most frequently EWSR1::NR4A3'.
emcCellLine2025.role: Source of NCC-EMC1-C1 model and the 221-compound screen (brigatinib, panobinostat, romidepsin low-IC50 hits — primary-abstract confirmed). Line's specific fusion still not stated per-line in the abstract (background says EMC is most-frequently EWSR1::NR4A3); tagged tentative in samples.json.

warmke2023.title: Extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma: clinicopathologic and molecular analysis with fusion-partner correlation

agaram2014.title: Extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma with non-EWSR1-NR4A3 variant fusions correlate with rhabdoid phenotype and high-grade morphology
agaram2014.role: 26-case cohort (EWSR1 16, TAF15 7, TCF12 1, ...); variant fusions link to rhabdoid/high-grade.

emcNGS2017.title: Comprehensive molecular characterization of metastatic extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
emcNGS2017.role: Metastatic EWSR1::NR4A3 NGS; no recurrent secondary driver; RET expression elevated; folate-receptor in a minority.

matchedTrioWGS.title: Whole-genome sequencing of matched primary and metastatic extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
matchedTrioWGS.role: EWSR1::NR4A3 shared founding lesion across primary + 2 mets; SV burden rises in late met (quiet genome, clonal fusion).

filion2009.title: The EWSR1/NR4A3 fusion protein of extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma activates the PPARG nuclear receptor gene
filion2009.role: Fusion binds PPARG promoter response element and transactivates it (gain-of-function).

kim2016.title: Transcriptional activation by the NR4A3 fusion oncoprotein
kim2016.role: Fusion is a transcriptionally active oncoprotein; SGK1 linkage.

urbini2018.title: Recurrent KIT exon-11 mutation in a subset of EMC
urbini2018.role: KIT mutation in a rare (~5%) minority; genomically quiet otherwise.

nr4aReview2019.title: NR4A nuclear receptors in health and disease
nr4aReview2019.role: NR4A3 is an orphan nuclear receptor; no validated selective ligand; NBRE/NurRE grammar.

mullican2007.title: Abrogation of nuclear receptors Nr4a3 and Nr4a1 leads to development of acute myeloid leukemia
mullican2007.role: Combined Nr4a1/Nr4a3 loss -> AML; single nulls do not (myeloid-specific redundancy; basis for NR4A1-sparing).

higuchi2023.title: Zaltoprofen inhibits EMC cell growth by inducing PPARG, p21, p27, p53
higuchi2023.role: PPARG-agonist context; PPARG as consequence not validated drug target.

GSE4303.title: Gene expression profiling of extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma (legacy microarray)
GSE4303.verification_level: REPROCESSING ATTEMPTED in CI (2026-07-11): 7 legacy custom two-colour platforms (GPL2937/2938/3254/3288/3289/3290/3335). GPL3290 has 10 EMC vs 6 other, but NONE expose a standard probe->symbol column, so 0 genes could be annotated -> no gene-level signature recoverable without a bespoke clone-ID crosswalk. Honest limitation.
GSE4303.role: Public EMC expression (distinctive NMB/PPARG profile per original study). Two-colour log-ratio; not annotatable from standard GPL columns. Superseded for the atlas signature by GSE24369.

GSE24369.title: Sarcoma expression compendium including EMC comparison tumors
GSE24369.verification_level: REPROCESSED in CI (2026-07-11, atlas-data.yml): GPL6244 (Affymetrix Human Gene 1.0 ST), 42 samples labeled 6 EMC vs 36 other sarcoma, 23,072 genes annotated. QC passed (single-channel).
GSE24369.role: Primary EMC-vs-sarcoma expression comparison. Rank-based signature reproduces known EMC biology (NMB, CHRNA6, RET, SOX9, NR4A3, PPARG all EMC-up). See atlasExpressionRepro / claim C018.

pazopanibEMC.title: Pazopanib for treatment of advanced extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma: a multicentre, single-arm, phase 2 trial
pazopanibEMC.authors: Stacchiotti S, Ferrari S, Redondo A, et al.
pazopanibEMC.verification_level: PRIMARY ABSTRACT confirmed via EuropePMC (CI, 2026-07-11): 'four (18% [95% CI 1-36]) had a RECIST objective response'; 22 evaluable.
pazopanibEMC.role: N=26 enrolled/22 evaluable; ORR 18% (4 PR/22, 95% CI 1-36); median PFS 19 mo (95% CI 11-27), 12-mo PFS 74%, 24-mo 40%. Responders EWSR1::NR4A3. NOTE: responses CONFINED to EWSR1::NR4A3 — not a formal TAF15-vs-EWSR1 statistical test in this trial (that differential is explicit in the sunitinib paper).

sunitinibEMC.title: Activity of sunitinib in extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
sunitinibEMC.authors: Stacchiotti S, Pantaleo MA, Astolfi A, et al.
sunitinibEMC.verification_level: PRIMARY ABSTRACT confirmed via EuropePMC (CI, 2026-07-11): '6 PR, 2 SD, 2 PD; all responsive cases expressed the typical EWSR1-NR4A3 fusion, while refractory cases carried the alternative TAF15-NR4A3 fusion. Genotype/phenotype analyses support a correlation between response and EWSR1-NR4A3 fusion.'
sunitinibEMC.role: N=10 progressive metastatic translocated EMC (sunitinib 37.5 mg/d); 6 PR, 2 SD, 2 PD. KEY: the EWSR1-responsive / TAF15-refractory differential is EXPLICIT here (primary-abstract confirmed) — the load-bearing evidence for the fusion-subtype antiangiogenic biomarker (strategy Rank 3). Precursor N=2: Clin Sarcoma Res 2012;2:22, PMC3534218.

immunosarc2.title: Phase II of sunitinib plus nivolumab in extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma: results from the GEIS, ISG, and UCL IMMUNOSARC II study
immunosarc2.role: N=23 evaluable; 6-mo PFS 77% (16/23); median PFS 13.2 mo (95% CI 5.7-20.7); 2 PR (9%), 18 SD (82%), 2 PD (9%); 12-mo OS 90%. Single-arm — SD/PFS can overstate effect in an indolent disease without growth-rate/external control.

caboIpiNivo.title: Testing Ipilimumab and Nivolumab Combination With or Without Cabozantinib in People >=18 With Advanced Soft Tissue Sarcoma
caboIpiNivo.verification_level: ClinicalTrials.gov title/design confirmed via search; recruitment status + EMC-cohort-vs-pooled UNVERIFIED.
caboIpiNivo.role: Randomized phase II ipi/nivo +/- cabozantinib. EMC is one of 4 pre-specified eligible histologies (UPS, EMC, liposarcoma, non-uterine LMS) — a named eligible histology, NOT a standalone EMC arm. May help separate immuno from multikinase effects.

japanRegistry2025.title: The role of radiotherapy and chemotherapy in extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
japanRegistry2025.authors: Masunaga T, Tsukamoto S, Nagano A, et al.
japanRegistry2025.verification_level: PRIMARY ABSTRACT confirmed via EuropePMC (CI, 2026-07-11): N=171 (2002-2022); 'R1 or R2 surgical margin was a risk factor for unfavorable local recurrence (HR 4.76 [95% CI 1.72-13.15]; p=0.003)'. (PMC OA — full text retrievable for deeper extraction.)
japanRegistry2025.role: Japanese National Bone & Soft Tissue Tumor Registry 2002-2022, N=171 (29 met, 142 non-met). R1/R2 margin RF for local recurrence (HR 4.76, 95% CI 1.72-13.15). RT null for LR (HR 0.50 per earlier read). Chemo limited/no survival effect. Limited molecular annotation.

anthracyclineEMC.title: Anthracycline-based chemotherapy in extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma: a retrospective study
anthracyclineEMC.authors: Stacchiotti S, Dagrada GP, Sanfilippo R, et al.
anthracyclineEMC.verification_level: PRIMARY ABSTRACT confirmed via EuropePMC (CI, 2026-07-11, PMC OA): 11 EMC (Italian Rare Cancer Network, NR4A3-confirmed); 'best response by RECIST: PR = 4 (40%), SD = 3, PD = 3'.
anthracyclineEMC.role: N=11 (10 evaluable), 4 PR (40%), 3 SD, 3 PD; median PFS ~8 mo. Chemosensitivity is non-zero but not a unique EMC vulnerability.

depmap24Q4.role: In-repo cached queries (research/modalities/depmap-*.json + depmap-insilico-findings.md). NO EMC line exists in DepMap; sarcoma lines used as surrogate. Surrogate evidence, not EMC data.

gnomad.role: In-repo query (nr4a_safety_genetics.py): NR4A3 pLI 0.9999 LOEUF 0.37; NR4A2 pLI 1.0; NR4A1 tolerant.

hpa.role: In-repo query: NR4A1/NR4A3 broad co-expression; NR4A2 tissue-enhanced (CNS). Surface-protein reads for surface targets.

mhcflurry2.role: MHC-I binding/presentation predictor used for junction-neoantigen scoring (%rank<=0.5 strong, netMHC convention).

afnd2020.title: Allele frequency net database (AFND) 2020 update
afnd2020.role: Population HLA allele frequencies (Wilson CIs; class I+II) for coverage estimates. Mirror: github.com/slowkow/allelefrequencies.

antigenComputationRepo.role: Deterministic in-repo computation (strategy Project 4 core): junction-spanning MHC-I prediction, breakpoint-resolved junctions, HLA population coverage. Outputs: fusion-neoantigen-predictions.json, fusion-breakpoint-neoantigens.json, hla-coverage.json.

atlasExpressionRepro.role: Deterministic in-CI reprocessing of GEO series matrices (rank-based EMC-vs-rest AUC, per platform, leave-one-out). Ran on a GitHub Actions runner because the dev sandbox blocks GEO. See METHODS.md.

biologyEvidenceRepo.role: Adversarially-verified (95-agent, 3-vote) synthesis; itself sourced to primary PMIDs. The decisive gap: NO direct loss-of-function experiment in any EMC line exists.
